ddls:
CREATE TABLE "power_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power reading */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone within the hardware */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Time elapsed during the reading in seconds */,
  "power_j" REAL /* Power consumption in joules */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power consumption in watts */,
  "watts_since_last" REAL /* Difference in watts since the last reading */,
  "start_power" REAL /* Starting power value in joules */,
  "prev_power" REAL /* Previous power value in joules */,
  "prev_power_reading" REAL /* Previous power reading value in joules */,
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hardware being monitored */,
  "reading_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_readings_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_readings_hardware_id FOREIGN KEY ("hardware_id") REFERENCES hardwares ("hardware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., package-0, dram, core, uncore) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the power reading associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high consumption, low consumption) */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES power_readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone being monitored */,
  "average_watts" REAL /* Average power consumption in watts over a period */,
  "peak_watts" REAL /* Peak power consumption in watts over a period */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trend was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_trends_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., error, warning, info) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardwares" (
  "hardware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware */,
  "hardware_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hardware */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hardware_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, view power readings) */,
  "activity_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the activity occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_reading_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical power reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original power reading */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone being monitored */,
  "time_elapsed" REAL /* Time elapsed during the reading in seconds */,
  "power_j" REAL /* Power consumption in joules */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power consumption in watts */,
  "watts_since_last" REAL /* Difference in watts since the last reading */,
  "start_power" REAL /* Starting power value in joules */,
  "prev_power" REAL /* Previous power value in joules */,
  "prev_power_reading" REAL /* Previous power reading value in joules */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was taken */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_reading_history_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES power_readings ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_reading_history_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)
